notes: Stack Overflow homepage. Top bar with search and auth links, left sidebar navigation (Home, Questions, Tags, Users, Companies, Collectives), central question feed, right sidebar with community content. Redesigned in early 2026 with simplified navigation. Replaces paypal-signin (bot-protected).

endpoints.label: Search Bar
endpoints.description: Main search input in top bar for searching questions, answers, and tags

endpoints.label: Log In
endpoints.description: Log in button/link in the top bar header

endpoints.label: Sign Up
endpoints.description: Sign up button/link in the top bar header for new account creation

endpoints.label: Left Sidebar Navigation
endpoints.description: Left sidebar with links to Home, Questions, Tags, Users, Companies, and Collectives

endpoints.label: Question Feed
endpoints.description: Central list of questions with titles, vote counts, answer counts, and tags

endpoints.label: Ask Question
endpoints.description: Ask Question button to create a new question post
